scripts.build: npm run build:website && npm run build:tools && npm run build:timorleste
scripts.build:tools: npm run build:digital-assessment && npm run build:sentiment-analysis && npm run build:cbt-monitoring && npm run build:instagram-index && npm run build:botswana
scripts.build:botswana: cd digital_assessment/projects/botswana/dashboard && npm run build && cd ../../../.. && mkdir -p build/botswana && cp -r digital_assessment/projects/botswana/dashboard/dist/* build/botswana/
scripts.build:digital-assessment: cd tools/digital-assessment && npm run build && cd ../.. && cp -r tools/digital-assessment/dist/assets build/ && cp -r tools/digital-assessment/dist/gambia-itc build/ && cp tools/digital-assessment/dist/index.html build/gambia-itc/index.html
scripts.build:sentiment-analysis: cd tools/tourism-sentiment/frontend && npm run build && cd ../../.. && mkdir -p build/sentiment-analysis && cp -r tools/tourism-sentiment/frontend/dist/* build/sentiment-analysis/ && echo '/* /index.html 200' > build/_redirects
scripts.build:cbt-monitoring: cd tools/cbt-monitoring && npm run build && cd ../.. && mkdir -p build/cbt-monitoring && cp -r tools/cbt-monitoring/dist/* build/cbt-monitoring/
scripts.build:instagram-index: cd tools/tourism-instagram-index && npm run build && cd ../.. && mkdir -p build/tourism-instagram-index && cp -r tools/tourism-instagram-index/dist/* build/tourism-instagram-index/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
